haitian_creole.barry_harris_1929_2021_codified_bebop_: Barry Harris (1929-2021) te kodifye amoni bebop. Sistèm li itilize chord 6yèm olye 7yèm epi li ajoute diminished passing chords ant degre yo nan scale a pou yon voice leading ki dous.
haitian_creole.attack_time_to_reach_full_volume_decay: Attack: tan pou rive nan vòlim konplè. Decay: tan pou tonbe rive nan sustain. Sustain: nivo vòlim ki kenbe. Release: tan pou disparèt apre ou lage kle a.
haitian_creole.a_scale_is_an_ordered_set_of_pitches_m: Yon scale se yon ansanm pitch ki ranje. Modes se wotasyon scale a ki kòmanse sou diferan degre. Chak kreye yon anbyans emosyonèl diferan.
haitian_creole.chords_are_built_by_stacking_intervals: Chord yo bati lè yo anpile entèval (3yèm). Major itilize yon major 3rd + minor 3rd. Minor ranvèse yo. Chord elaji ajoute 7yèm, 9yèm, ak pi lwen.
haitian_creole.kicks_use_a_sine_oscillator_with_a_pit: Kick yo itilize yon oscillator sine ak yon pitch sweep. Snare melanje bri (filtre) + kò ton. Hi-hat itilize eklate bri filtre ak high-pass.
haitian_creole.4_4_4_quarter_note_beats_per_bar_most_: 4/4 = 4 beat quarter-note pou chak baa (pi komen). 3/4 = sansasyon waltz. 6/8 = compound duple. 5/4 ak 7/8 kreye grooves ki pa senmetrik, egzotik.
haitian_creole.keys_arranged_by_ascending_5ths_clockw: Kle yo ranje pa 5yèm k ap monte nan sans revèy la. Kle vwazen pataje 6 nòt sou 7. Ale nan sans revèy ajoute sharp; sans kontrè ajoute flat.
haitian_creole.every_musical_sound_contains_overtones: Chak son mizik gen overtones anwo fondamantal la. Fòs relatif yo detèmine timbre — se poutèt sa yon twonpèt sonnen diferan de yon flit sou menm pitch la.
haitian_creole.an_interval_is_the_distance_between_tw: Yon entèval se distans ant de pitch, mezire an semiton. Rapò frekans lan detèmine konsonans (rapò senp tankou 3:2 sonnen dous).
haitian_creole.plays_chord_notes_one_at_a_time_in_seq: Jwe nòt chord yo youn apre lòt an sekans. Anlè = anba pou anlè, Anba = anlè pou anba. Kreye modèl k ap koule soti nan chord estatik.
haitian_creole.a_filter_removes_frequencies_above_low: Yon filtè retire frekans anwo (lowpass), anba (highpass), oswa alantou (bandpass) yon frekans cutoff. Resonans (Q) amplifye frekans toupre cutoff, ki kreye yon pik.
haitian_creole.tremolo_periodic_volume_changes_amplit: Tremolo: chanjman vòlim peryodik (amplitude modulation). Vibrato: chanjman pitch peryodik (frequency modulation). Toude kontwole pa yon LFO (Low Frequency Oscillator).
haitian_creole.discovered_in_1983_a_noise_burst_feeds: Yo te dekouvri li an 1983. Yon eklate bri antre nan yon delay line trè kout ak feedback. Tan delay la detèmine pitch. Yon filtè nan feedback loop kontwole klète ak disparisyon. Li imite kòd yo rale natirèlman.
haitian_creole.the_sequencer_is_a_composition_tool_ea: Sequencer se yon zouti konpozisyon. Chak etap reprezante yon sibdivizyon beat. Ranje melodi mete nòt ak pitch, tanbou ajoute ritm. Notasyon mizik montre sa ou kreye.
haitian_creole.notes_on_lines_and_spaces_represent_pi: Nòt sou liy ak espas reprezante pitch. Yo montre dire pa fòm nòt la: antye (○), mwatye (𝅗𝅥), quarter (♩), wityèm (♪). Staff la itilize 5 liy.
haitian_creole.equal_temperament_12_notes_per_octave_: Equal temperament: 12 nòt pou chak oktav, rapò 2^(1/12). A4 = 440 Hz; A5 = 880 Hz. Well-Tempered Clavier Bach (1722) te konvenk mond lan sou konpwomi sa a. Chak nòt ou jwe isit la ap viv sou grid sa a.
haitian_creole.major_w_w_h_w_w_w_h_minor_w_h_w_w_h_w_: Major: W-W-H-W-W-W-H. Minor: W-H-W-W-H-W-W. 7 modes (Ionian, Dorian, Phrygian, Lydian, Mixolydian, Aeolian, Locrian) soti nan wotasyon modèl entèval major-scale la.
haitian_creole.triads_root_third_fifth_major_4_3_semi: Triads: root + third + fifth. Major (semiton 4+3), minor (3+4), diminished (3+3), augmented (4+4). Chord 7yèm ajoute yon lòt third. Mizik pop = ~6 chord ki repete; jazz itilize ekstansyon ak sibstitisyon.
haitian_creole.harmony_pad_voiced_pads_drones: Harmony Pad — pad ak vwa + drones
haitian_creole.sustained_chord_textures_the_bed_under: Teksti chord ki soutni — baz ki anba prèske tout mizik sinema. Eseye iv-V-i nan minor, oswa i-VI-VII pou sansasyon Hans Zimmer sa a. Drones nan fifths sipòte tradisyon mizik klasik Endyen ak bagpipe.
haitian_creole.beat_pad_sample_based_drums: Beat Pad — tanbou ki baze sou sample
haitian_creole.most_popular_music_sits_at_4_4_90_130_: Pifò mizik popilè chita nan 4/4, 90-130 BPM. Hip-hop ~85-95, house 120-130, drum-and-bass ~170 (sansasyon half-time). Kick sou 1+3, snare sou 2+4 = backbeat — baz rock + pop.
haitian_creole.pythagoras_500_bce_discovered_consonan: Pythagoras (~500 anvan JC) te dekouvri konsonans soti nan rapò frekans antye: oktav 2:1, fifth 3:2, fourth 4:3. Helmholtz te elaji sa an 1862. Son = onn konpresyon; mizik = modèl nou dakò pou rele bèl.
haitian_creole.full_chord_grid_strum_plate_and_voice_: Chord grid konplè, strum plate, ak voice presets
haitian_creole.drag_across_strings_to_strum: Rale atravè kòd yo pou strum!
haitian_creole.frequency_modulation_fm_synthesis_uses: Sentèz Frequency Modulation (FM) itilize yon oscillator (modulator) pou chanje frekans yon lòt (carrier) rapidman. Rapò modulator:carrier detèmine harmonic content. Rapò senp (1:1, 2:1, 3:1) pwodwi harmonic tones. Rapò konplèks pwodwi son metalik, tankou klòch, oswa ki pa harmonic. Yamaha DX7 te popilarize FM an 1983.
haitian_creole.supersaw_stacks_multiple_sawtooth_osci: SuperSaw anpile plizyè sawtooth oscillators ki yon ti jan detune youn ak lòt. Sa kreye yon gwo son laj, ki klere — mak EDM, trance, ak pop modèn. Plis vwa = son pi epè men itilize plis CPU. Detuning kontwole konbyen vwa yo detune — plis detune = pi laj/tankou chorus, mwens = pi sere/pi konsantre.
haitian_creole.an_arpeggiator_plays_the_notes_of_a_ch: 🔬 Yon arpeggiator jwe nòt yon chord youn apre lòt an sekans. "Up" ale anba pou anlè, li kreye enèji k ap monte. "Down" desann pou yon sansasyon kaskad. Vitès kontwole rapidite (pi ba = pi rapid). Gate kontwole konbyen tan chak nòt sonnen (100% = legato, 10% = staccato). Eseye vitès=100ms + 4 oktav + up pattern pou yon classic trance arp!
haitian_creole.sing_speak_or_play_an_instrument_hear_: Chante, pale, oswa jwe yon enstriman — tande efè an tan reyèl!
haitian_creole.monitor_hear_yourself_use_headphones: 🔊 Monitor (tande tèt ou — sèvi ak headphones!)
haitian_creole.removes_frequencies_above_lowpass_or_b: Retire frekans anwo (lowpass) oswa anba (highpass) yon sèy. Tankou mete men ou sou bouch ou — li retire frekans wo, li fè son an "pi fonse."
haitian_creole.creates_echoes_by_copying_the_signal_a: Kreye eko lè li kopye siyal la epi rejwe li apre yon ti tan. Feedback kontwole konbyen eko ki repete.
haitian_creole.simulates_room_acoustics_by_creating_t: Simile akoustik yon chanm lè li kreye plizyè milye ti eko ki melanje ansanm. Ti chanm = reverb kout, katedral = reverb long.
haitian_creole.clips_the_waveform_peaks_turning_smoot: Koupe pik waveform la, li transfòme sine waves dous an fòm di, angilè. Sa ajoute nouvo harmonics ki pa te nan son orijinal la.
haitian_creole.duplicates_the_signal_with_a_slight_co: Kopye siyal la ak yon ti delay ki chanje san rete. Sa simile plizyè vwa/enstriman k ap jwe ansanm ak yon ti diferans nan tan.
haitian_creole.rapidly_varies_the_volume_up_and_down_: Varye vòlim la anlè ak anba rapidman, li kreye yon efè k ap bat. Komen nan surf guitar ak mizik òg.
haitian_creole.use_headphones_when_monitoring_to_avoi: Sèvi ak headphones lè w ap monitor pou evite feedback loops! Mic la pase nan tout efè anwo yo (filtè, delay, reverb, elatriye) — ajiste yo pou tande kijan chak transfòme vwa ou oswa enstriman ou.
haitian_creole.connect_your_microphone_to_run_your_vo: Konekte mikwofòn ou pou fè vwa ou oswa enstriman ou pase nan chèn efè a an tan reyèl.
haitian_creole.see_your_voice_as_a_waveform_frequency: Wè vwa ou kòm yon waveform + frequency spectrum. Tande kijan filtè, delay, reverb, distortion, ak chorus chanje onn son fizikman.
haitian_creole.touch_drag_x_pitch_y_filter_effect: Manyen & rale — X = pitch, Y = filtè/efè
haitian_creole.the_xy_pad_maps_your_finger_mouse_posi: XY pad la konekte pozisyon dwèt/souri ou ak paramèt mizik an tan reyèl. Aks X kontwole pitch (gòch = ba, dwat = wo). Aks Y kontwole filtè cutoff frequency (anlè = klè, anba = fonse). Sa sanble ak enstriman tankou Korg Kaoss Pad, ki te revolisyone pèfòmans mizik elektwonik an dirèk lè li transfòme gès 2D an son.
haitian_creole.xy_performance_pad_left_right_is_pitch: XY performance pad. Gòch-dwat se pitch, anlè-anba se klète filtè. Sèvi ak flèch yo pou deplase ak jwe yon nòt; peze Escape oswa Space pou kanpe.
haitian_creole.sequencer_drum_pads_notation_samples_m: Sequencer, drum pads, notasyon, samples & plis →
haitian_creole.click_cells_to_place_notes_visual_melo: Klike sèl yo pou mete nòt — vizyèl melodi editor
haitian_creole.chord_progressions_create_emotional_jo: Progresyon chord kreye vwayaj emosyonèl. Chord I (tonic) santi tankou 'kay.' Chord V (dominant) kreye tansyon ki vle rezoud pou retounen nan I. Chord vi (relative minor) ajoute tristès oswa pwofondè. Chord IV (subdominant) deplase lwen kay dousman. Yo estime progresyon I-V-vi-IV parèt nan plis pase 70% chanson pop paske li balanse emosyon sa yo pafètman.
haitian_creole.roman_numerals_i_ii_iii_iv_v_vi_vii_re: Chif Women (I, ii, iii, IV, V, vi, vii°) reprezante degre scale. Majiskil = chord major. Miniskil = chord minor.
haitian_creole.click_notes_to_hear_them: Klike nòt yo pou tande yo!
haitian_creole.add_melody_notes_in_the_grid_above: Ajoute nòt melodi nan grid anwo a ↑
haitian_creole.click_melody_cells_in_the_grid_above_t: Klike sèl melodi nan grid anwo a pou wè notasyon isit la
haitian_creole.load_this_rhythm_into_row_0_kick: Chaje ritm sa a nan ranje 0 (Kick)?
haitian_creole.click_challenge_me_to_practice_rhythm_: Klike "Defye m!" pou pratike modèl ritm
haitian_creole.upload_wav_mp3_files_for_custom_pads_s: Telechaje fichye WAV/MP3 pou custom pads. Samples efase lè paj la rafrechi.
haitian_creole.chain_patterns_into_a_full_song: Chene modèl yo an yon chanson konplè
haitian_creole.add_current_pattern_as_a_section: Ajoute modèl aktyèl la kòm yon seksyon
haitian_creole.create_a_drum_pattern_in_the_grid_abov: Kreye yon drum pattern nan grid anwo a, epi klike "+ Ajoute Aktyèl la kòm Seksyon" pou kòmanse konstwi yon chanson.
haitian_creole.sections_intro_verse_chorus_bridge_cho: Seksyon: Intro → Verse → Chorus → Bridge → Chorus → Outro
haitian_creole.no_saved_beats_yet_create_a_pattern_an: Poko gen beats anrejistre. Kreye yon modèl epi klike Anrejistre!
haitian_creole.harmonypad_creates_warm_pure_tones_by_: HarmonyPad kreye ton cho, pi lè li melanje sine ak triangle waves. Chwazi yon vwa, chwazi yon chord nan grid anba a, epi strum plate a!
haitian_creole.chord_grid_tap_to_select_space_to_stru: 🎶 Chord Grid — tape pou chwazi, Space pou strum
haitian_creole.strum_plate_tap_or_drag_across: 🎸 Strum Plate — tape oswa rale atravè
haitian_creole.hear_see_the_waveform_and_learn_the_st: Tande, wè waveform lan, epi aprann istwa chak enstriman
haitian_creole.this_is_how_different_instruments_get_: Se konsa diferan enstriman jwenn son inik yo! Yon flit se sitou harmonic 1 (sine). Yon klarinèt gen odd harmonics (1,3,5,7). Yon vyolon gen tout harmonics. Klike pou konstwi pwòp timbre ou!
haitian_creole.karplus_strong_synthesis_creates_reali: Sentèz Karplus-Strong kreye son kòd rale reyalis lè li itilize yon ti eklate bri voye nan yon delay line ak filtered feedback. Ajiste klète (koulè bri inisyal) ak damping (longè sustain) pou fòme karaktè kòd la.
haitian_creole.identify_each_note_in_the_4_note_melod: Idantifye chak nòt nan melodi 4-nòt la:
haitian_creole.fundamental_heavy_gentle_highs_acousti: Fondamantal lou, wo dous. Tankou acoustic.
haitian_creole.mid_heavy_without_fundamental_woody_cu: Mwayen lou san fondamantal — tankou bwa/flit koukou.
haitian_creole.almost_pure_fundamental_muffled_sub_li: Prèske fondamantal pi — toufe / tankou sub.
haitian_creole.roughly_equal_harmonics_full_natural_t: Harmonics apeprè egal — timbre konplè / natirèl.
haitian_creole.adjust_fundamental_mid_and_high_harmon: Ajiste nivo harmonic fondamantal, mwayen, ak wo. Widget lan klase youn nan senk timbres diferan. Pa gen nòt, pa gen revelasyon — deplase epi obsève.
haitian_creole.hypothesis_free_text_which_harmonic_le: Ipotèz (tèks lib): Ki nivo harmonic ki detèmine "klè" kont "cho"?
haitian_creole.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Kenbe de sliders fiks. Deplase youn. Obsève.
haitian_creole.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Jwenn de anviwònman ki pwodwi menm timbre a. Ki rapò yo pataje?
haitian_creole.real_instruments_have_characteristic_s: Vrè enstriman gen spectra karakteristik. Envestige poukisa yon flit sonnen diferan de yon vyolon.
haitian_creole.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Mwen konprann — eksplike ak pwòp mo mwen
haitian_creole.explain_how_harmonic_content_determine: Eksplike kijan harmonic content detèmine pèsepsyon timbre.
haitian_creole.design_note_discrete_5_class_timbre_ma: Nòt konsepsyon: discrete 5-class timbre marker; pa gen nòt fidelite son; pa gen revelasyon — espre.
haitian_creole.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: an sèvi ak mo senp chak jou ak fraz kout, san jagon
haitian_creole.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: pou yon elèv klas 5, kout epi amikal
haitian_creole.for_a_student_who_already_knows_some_m: pou yon elèv ki deja konnen kèk teyori mizik
haitian_creole.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Klike "Eksplike" pou tutè IA a dekri sa vi sa a anseye nan nivo lekti ou chwazi a.
haitian_creole.harmonic_series_why_instruments_sound_: 🎵 Harmonic Series — Poukisa enstriman sonnen diferan
